{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230336065AC9B3F927F374937A02"}"},"total":4063},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7056358229521679111","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得这个特别牛特别好看！前期题材叫我新颖，但是到了中期总是重复看腻了，但是坐着好像发现这样总是重复不好不会吸引读者到后面现在又有点特色，有点趣味，然后呢我之前呢因为中期的重复，有点腻了。但是后面又因为作者你新颖的题材我又觉得应该后面很好看，期待加油作者。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642936431,"group_id":"7018816689454189583","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在生活中传递快乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+eBomQJP1Er9Cg1IxyRxOs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3ddc4e9271f54f598478ffd6786ec13d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794545&x-signature=asnks0cvncdyWrP8Kx3D4m%2FX1pE%3D","user_id":"104362543703","user_name":"三心二意的刘某"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104362543703","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771292823,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7018816689454189583","book_info":{"abstract":"【爆爽快穿文，诸天万界+人生模拟】

通天:鸿钧老儿，看剑！
 人生就像游戏，不服那就重启！
